tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Most parameters are within normal limits. Notable findings include mildly low fasting glucose, low HDL cholesterol, and elevated LDL cholesterol, which increase cardiovascular risk. HbA1c is normal, indicating good long-term glucose control. Renal function and electrolytes are normal, and there is no evidence of microalbuminuria. Recommend addressing dyslipidemia and monitoring glucose.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
